race.comment: Tough. TAYLOR'S RAGE (9) broke her Maiden last start over 1000m at this track, scoring by 3 lengths. Maps well and will be fitter again. Won't have to improve much to take the next step. QUARTER RED (6) let down nicely beaten 1.2L here over 1000m at 55 level. Looks to have more to offer and should enjoy a soft run from the inside barrier. MY SICADA (4) is third-up and should be ready to test his best form. Draws inside and will race forward. On an 8-day return and keep onside. MINXY (10) has an awkward barrier but is knocking on the door and she can get some of the money with average luck in running.
